additional_rules.name: transactional-on-adapter
additional_rules.message: @Transactional on adapter class — should be on use case only
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move @Transactional to the use-case / service layer; adapters should not own transaction boundaries.

additional_rules.name: java-uuid-in-core
additional_rules.message: java.util.UUID in core — use kotlin.uuid.Uuid with typed ID wrapper
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace java.util.UUID with kotlin.uuid.Uuid and wrap in a domain-specific value class (e.g., XxxId).

additional_rules.name: java-time-in-core
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace java.time.* imports with kotlinx.datetime equivalents (Instant, LocalDate, etc.).

additional_rules.name: console-output-in-production
additional_rules.message: Console output in non-test code — use structured logging instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace println/print/System.out with a logger (e.g., KotlinLogging.logger or SLF4J).
